heading: Omitted
label: 903g Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , which exempted contracts for labor or supplies from certain advertising requirements, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.act Oct. 10, 1940, ch. 851, § 3(c)54 Stat. 1111
